_note: Discord bot-friendly endpoint — pre-formatted Discord embed payload. Pattern: tarkov.dev community API. Update after every patch release via make build.

embed.title: SpiritVale v0.18.0 — New and Revamped Maps
embed.description:
**3 added · 6 changed · 5 fixed · 0 removed**
Patch released 2026-06-02

fields.name: 🟢 Added (3)
fields.value:
17 new maps (Sunny Meadows, Forest Field, Lake Field, Mystic Lake, Nevaris Sewers…)
~12 new early-mid gear items
New pets

fields.name: 🔵 Changed (6)
fields.value: Maps rearranged for better layout · New World Map UI · New artifact icons (artist-made) · Autocast bolt damage –50%

fields.name: 🔧 Fixed (5)
fields.value: Skill mods not affecting summons · Gold dupe exploit · Vending sales UI · Item count display · Vending stuck state
